titleEn: Extended export campaign for Beninese pineapples
contentHtml: Beninese pineapple exporters are continuing to ship fruit later into the year than usual, with European demand running unusually strong through June, according to Edouard Choubiyi, president of the Benin Pineapple Exporters Association (AEAB). "We're still exporting pineapples, as we're nearing the end…
